name: Yin Yi

sections.short-biography: Sent with Lü Dai to Zhang Lu to ask the warlord to attack Cao Cao’s holdings in Jing but was refused.

full_text:
Yin Yi
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yin Yi. Sent with Lü Dai to Zhang Lu to ask the warlord to attack Cao Cao’s holdings in Jing but was refused. Yin Yi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
